title: Better Allays
description: Makes allays useful in storage systems!
body:
Allays are quite useless when it comes to item transport, this mod aims to improve that!

# Mod Features:
- Allays can now use bundles as an item filter
(put 1 of each item and give it to the player)
- Allays now have better movement code
- Allays can now be tuned to a noteblock and will only go towards the noteblocks they are tuned to(right click an allay while holding a noteblock to tune them)
- Allays now spawn in village church houses(if a village type has one)
